title: Fresh HUD
description: Refresh your Minecraft gameplay with a new UI!
body:
**Fresh HUD** — is a unique resource pack created to update and improve your classic version of Minecraft. Our mission and main idea is to reimagine and breathe new life into Minecraft textures, filling them with fresh inspiration and bright colors, as well as making the resource pack work in all versions of the game! 

**This resource pack is made by compiling other resource packs, which means that the textures for this resource pack were not “drawn” by me, but by other authors listed below. If you are one of them and I forgot to mention you below, you can write to me on Discord at the link below!**

## ❗Used
Resourcespacks that were used to create "Fresh HUD":

- [Retextured Minecraft](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/retextured-minecraft)
- [Better HUD icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-hud-icons)
  
**(If you are the author of one of the resourcepacks or a resourcepack that is not on this list, message me in Discord)**

## 💬 Community
Join our [community on the discord server](https://discord.gg/nSJBpkeVv6) to chat, ask questions, or share your creations!
